Caption: Illustration of the (a) F-SAFT algorithm principle; (b) experiment setup; (c) Schematic and result of the 1D scan, and (d) Schematic of the 2D scan for SAFT.

Influence of the Δ x on the defect’s location: (a) Detected defect depths at various generation-detection distance with and without equivalent factor corrections; (b) the calculated equivalent factor q 1 .
